eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Missouri; at 6:20 PM on JUL 1, 2026 Effective until 6:35 PM JUL 2, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
THE SAINT LOUIS COUNTY POLICE DEPARTMENT HAS ISSUED AN AMBER ALERT FOR A CHILD ABDUCTION THAT OCCURRED AT 1411 SHADYCREEK CRT ,  SAINT LOUIS , MISSOURI ON 07/01/2026 AT 01:00 PM.  

ABDUCTED WAS RUDO CHITURUMANI, BLACK, FEMALE, AGE 8. 

SUSPECT VEHICLE IS A DARK BLUE 2017 FORD EDGE SUV BEARING MARYLAND REGISTRATION '2' 'G' 'Y','1' '5' '9' '8'.  
VEHICLE/SUSPECT LAST SEEN UNKNOWN . 

SUSPECT IS MUNYARADZI CHITURUMANI A BLACK, MALE, 36, 5 FEET 8 INCHES TALL, 165 POUNDS, HAS BLACK HAIR AND BROWN EYES. 
LAST SEEN WEARING UNKNOWN CLOTHING. 

VICTIM RUDO CHITURUMANI. 
LAST SEEN WEARING UNKNOWN CLOTHING. 

SUSPECT IS THE NON-CUSTODIAL FATHER. ABDUCTION OCCURRED AFTER THE SUSPECT STABBED AND INJURED THE CHILD'S MOTHER. SUSPECT HAS MADE THREATS TOWARDS THE CHILD. . 

PLEASE CALL 9 1 1 OR ST LOUIS COUNTY POLICE DEPARTMENT AT 636-529-8210 IF YOU HAVE ANY INFORMATION PERTAINING TO THIS ALERT.
